summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEXXTECHS IT Education Institute website. All backend APIs (health, enquiry POST, enquiries GET) pass 100%. All frontend sections render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Enquiry form submission works end-to-end with MongoDB persistence. Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu works correctly.
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test enquiries created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_nexxtechs_api.py cover health check, enquiry creation, persistence verification, and validation. Frontend tested with Playwright covering all sections: Header (top bar, sticky nav, mobile menu), Hero, Courses Grid (10 cards), Popular Courses (8 cards), Why Choose Us (5 features), Student Projects (3 images), Placement (stats, testimonials, company logos), Enquiry Form (full submission flow), Footer, and Floating buttons.

backend: POST /api/enquiry - Validates required fields (422 for missing)
Enquiry persistence verification - Created enquiry found in GET response
Multiple enquiries creation - All courses saved correctly
frontend: Top bar with email (info@nextech.com) and phone (+91 7464099059) - PASS
Sticky header with all 7 navigation links - PASS
Enquire Now CTA button scrolls to enquiry form - PASS
Hero section with headline, CTAs, trust stats - PASS
Courses grid shows 10 course cards - PASS
Popular Courses shows 8 cards with duration/level - PASS
Why Choose Us shows 5 feature cards - PASS
Student Projects gallery shows 3 project images - PASS
Placement section with stats (5000+, 100+, 500+), 3 testimonials, 8 company logos - PASS
Enquiry form submission with success message - PASS
